name: Strawberry Rhubarb Custard Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 single unbaked 9-inch pastry shell (frozen or fresh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. Beat the eggs and add the milk, stirring in the sugar and flour.
3. Add the rhubarb and berries.
4. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
5. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes until the custard is firm.
